name: restos-cliente
description: Sistema de gestión de restaurante — monorepo (React + Express + Prisma + Socket.io)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @restos/backend" "npm run dev -w @restos/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @restos/backend && npm run build -w @restos/frontend
